description_long: This is a large, horizontally oriented banner featuring the word 'Quincy' in bold, stylized script with a feather motif and a lighthouse illustration on the left side. The background is a mix of dark blue and gray hues, giving the banner a mural-like appearance. The text is rendered in a gradient of yellow and white with blue shadows, making it stand out prominently. The edges of the banner are irregular and appear slightly tattered, suggesting it may be painted on a flexible or weathered material. There is a small circular emblem or seal on the lower right corner, adding a touch of official or commemorative detail. The overall design is visually striking and likely intended for public display in an urban setting.
description: A large, mural-style horizontal banner with 'Quincy' in bold script, a feather, and a lighthouse illustration on a dark blue background. The edges are irregular and the design is visually prominent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 'Quincy' text, feather, lighthouse, and emblem with all design elements clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extreme thinness of the banner and the irregular, slightly tattered edge profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mirrored design, with the text and illustrations reversed but still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlighting the thinness and edge details, with minimal visible design.
attribute_banner_content: city name with feather and lighthouse illustration
